title: trisetum flavescens subsp. tenue
intro: Trisetum flavescens subsp. tenue, also known as slender false brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trisetum flavescens subsp. tenue include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antidiabetic and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of Trisetum flavescens subsp. tenue typically involve making tea or infusions from the dried leaves and stems, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
